SHAO & MA VS LUNA, SOLARI & OLSON
RAMIREZ DEVELOPERS INC DBA PACIFIC CEMENT VS. SHEARWATER PARTNERS LLC et al
CHU KWAN VS. ON LOK et al
LINDA MCCULLOH VS. JUDICIAL COUNCIL OF CALIF SUSAN HOUGH et al
rulings.Rulings: DENY MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND ADJUDICATION AS TO DISABILITY DISCRIMINATION. TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT WHETHER FAILURE TO PROMOTE WAS BASED UPON DISCRIMINATION. AS TO DISABILITY HARRASSMENT - GRANT. NO TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT RE SEVERE AND PERVASIVE CONDUCT. AS TO FAILURE TO ACCOMMODATE - GRANT. AS TO RETALIATION - GRANT. NO TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT. (302/JJM/PB)
